author: doll-agent
content: Utility crates audit COMPLETE. Added 7 dataset generators (#318), 4 sparse helpers (#319), api_proof tests for all 5 crates (#323). Deferred: #320 (file I/O loaders load_svmlight_file etc.), #321 (network fetch_* + cache management), #322 (scipy parity for special functions). 372+ tests pass across utility crates, workspace builds clean, clippy clean, fmt clean.
